name: Battery Report
description: Generates a Windows battery health report and opens it
author: AgentOS

steps.command: powercfg /batteryreport /output "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\battery-report.html"; Write-Output 'Battery report saved to Desktop as battery-report.html'
Get-CimInstance Win32_Battery | Select-Object Name, EstimatedChargeRemaining, BatteryStatus, DesignCapacity, FullChargeCapacity | Format-List
